Origin allowlist enforced, disallowed origins rejected with safe 403/logging, and frontend ws/wss selection verified by focused tests.

Fixed session pointer compile drift; uncached session/handler checks passed; cmd/app builds; fresh empty Postgres migrated cleanly to target schema without chat_id/summary legacy fields; greenfield reset documented in README and docs/architecture.

Replaced /api/v1/messages runtime with deterministic DecisionService; go test ./internal/app/decision ./internal/app ./internal/transport/http/handler passes, TestMessageUsesDeterministicDecisionServiceWithoutLLM passes, and rg shows no llmClient.Decide or /llm/decide in internal/app or internal/transport/http.

Implemented atomic operator queue lifecycle schema/repositories/service with queue/accept/close, assignments/events, context snapshots, session FSM transition in same Postgres transaction, sqlc generation, and go test ./... verification

Implemented real escalate_to_operator behavior and fallback-to-operator policy: manual requests, complaints, repeated low confidence, and provider unavailable queue operator handoff with persisted reasons, session transition/context, action audit, worker tests, and go test ./... verification

Implemented same-session operator API/UI handoff: decision-engine operator DTO/context fields, operator message persistence as sender_type=operator, operator_connected bot silence, website same-origin operator proxy, compact operator console with demo login/filters/history/context/accept/reply/close, WS handoff/operator message delivery, JSON contract validation, go test ./... for decision-engine and website backend, frontend node tests, and git diff --check

Verified operator handoff intermediate gate with package-level evidence: manual request, complaint and repeated fallback handoff tests; queue accept/reply/close lifecycle tests; same-session operator sender_type history and websocket message.operator delivery tests; operator_connected bot-silence test; migration constraint checks; go test ./... for decision-engine and website backend; frontend node tests; git diff --check. Live Postgres DB proof was not run because localhost:5442 was unavailable and full DB/browser matrix remains in final E2E gate.

Implemented typed canned renderer with RenderInput carrying response template/key, action results, session context and data; wired worker to render selected action responses; missing placeholder data falls back to canned error_generic without raw placeholders; startup validation covers safe fallback, expected and renderable placeholders; typed quick replies preserved; verified booking/payment/account/workspace/escalation/fallback render tests, worker payment render integration, go test ./... in decision-engine, and git diff --check

Implemented typed canned renderer with RenderInput carrying response template/key, action results, session context and data; wired worker to render selected action responses; missing placeholder data falls back to canned error_generic without raw placeholders; startup validation covers safe fallback, expected and renderable placeholders; typed quick replies preserved; verified booking/payment/account/workspace/escalation/fallback render tests, worker payment render integration, go test ./... in decision-engine, and git diff --check

Implemented typed canned renderer with RenderInput carrying response template/key, action results, session context and data; wired worker to render selected action responses; missing placeholder data falls back to canned error_generic without raw placeholders; startup validation covers safe fallback, expected and renderable placeholders; typed quick replies preserved; verified booking/payment/account/workspace/escalation/fallback render tests, worker payment render integration, go test ./... in decision-engine, and git diff --check

Implemented typed quick replies end to end: HTTP/WS contracts include id,label,action,payload,order; renderer emits typed replies; frontend sends quick_reply.selected with typed object and renders malicious labels via textContent; website backend rejects invalid typed payloads instead of falling back to label; decision-engine routes select_intent/send_text from payload, stores quick reply id in message intent, and tests pass for decision-engine, website backend, frontend node suite, and git diff --check

Implemented DOM XSS hardening: chat and operator dynamic rendering use DOM APIs/textContent/addEventListener, production frontend JS has no innerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML/outerHTML/onclick/data-quick-reply sinks, malicious user/bot/operator/quick-reply/operator-context fixtures render as text, node frontend test suite passes 9/9, rg static sink check has no matches, and git diff --check passes

Intermediate web/WS/security gate passed on focused automated proof: website backend go test -count=1 ./... passed, frontend node tests passed 9/9, decision-engine handler/decision/presenter/worker/session focused go tests passed, unsafe frontend sink/static inline handler check had no production JS matches, CheckOrigin always-true pattern check had no matches. Covers two-browser session isolation via session tests, typed quick reply payload, XSS text rendering, Origin rejection/ws-wss selection, public error masking, and web/WS contract regressions. Live Docker/manual browser proof remains for final E2E gates.

Implemented read-only deterministic provider layer over demo fixtures: removed remaining hash/FNV generated action mock data, added typed booking/workspace availability/payment/account/pricing provider DTOs, mock provider fixture contracts, stable source=mock_external statuses/error codes, provider/source/status/duration_ms audit evidence, invalid/not_found/unavailable tests, timeout/read-only regressions, and JSON fixtures/contracts. Verified python json.tool for provider contract and seeds, targeted go test -count=1 for provider/actions/seed/processor/worker/http handler, full decision-engine go test -count=1 ./..., static rg no remaining hash/random mock generation in actions/providers, and git diff --check.

Intermediate business provider/negative-path gate passed on deterministic automated proof: provider/actions/seed tests passed, processor/worker/http handler tests passed, full decision-engine go test -count=1 ./... passed, provider contract and mock service seed JSON parsed, audit evidence includes provider/source/status/duration_ms, success/not_found/invalid/unavailable cases cover booking/workspace/workspace availability/payment/account/pricing, read-only fixture regression is covered, and representative deterministic happy/failure paths stay under the 3s provider budget. Live Docker/browser/DB E2E remains for full E2E/final gates.

Implemented new target services/nlp-service FastAPI runtime with /health, /ready, /api/v1/preprocess, /api/v1/embed, /api/v1/embed/batch; Russian normalization/tokenization/lemmatization with fallback, deterministic fake hash embeddings with configurable dimension/seed, unavailable readiness/embed mode, strict bounded schemas, and tests asserting Python responses do not contain intent/state/actions and /llm/decide is not mounted. Verified uv run --extra test python -m pytest passed 11/11, app/core static scan has no /llm/decide or decision fields, full service scan only matches guard tests, git diff --check passes, and generated Python caches/venv were removed.

Implemented and verified fresh pgvector schema/repository layer: added vector catalog migration, session_context/message_events/intents/intent_examples/knowledge_articles/knowledge_chunks/quick_replies/decision_candidates/demo data tables, audit/message extensions, HNSW/GiN/unique indexes, FK/constraint coverage, sqlc brd_catalog queries/generated code, and static schema tests. Verified sqlc generate, go test -count=1 ./internal/infrastructure/repository/postgres, full decision-engine go test -count=1 ./..., git diff --check, and live empty-DB goose migration on one-shot pgvector/pgvector:pg16 container; psql confirmed pgcrypto+vector, 22 target tables, and 5 key indexes.

Contracts/catalog/schema gate passed: seed/presenter/schema/http tests, full decision-engine go test, nlp-service pytest 11/11, website backend go test, frontend node tests 9/9, JSON contract/seed validation, YAML config parse, git diff --check, and live empty-DB pgvector migration bootstrap all passed. Implemented and verified SemanticIntentMatcher over pgvector intent examples: exact system/operator commands bypass NLP outages, semantic matching returns top-k candidates with confidence and ambiguity policy defaults 0.78/0.08, low-confidence/ambiguous/embedding-outage fallbacks preserve diagnostics, semantic seeds populate intents/intent_examples/knowledge chunks, and decision persistence records candidates. Verified focused worker test, services/decision-engine go test -count=1 ./..., git diff --check, and make check-core.
